description_long: This is a full-sized axe featuring a robust, straight wooden handle with a slightly contoured grip for ergonomic handling. The handle transitions from a natural wood finish to a darker, possibly rubberized grip at the end, providing both comfort and slip resistance. The axe head is made of metal and painted a vivid red, with a broad, wedge-shaped blade designed for splitting or chopping. The blade has a single sharp edge and a flat poll on the opposite side, suitable for striking. The mounting of the head to the handle appears traditional, with the head wedged securely onto the handle. Some markings or text are visible on the handle, suggesting possible branding or safety information.
description: A full-sized axe with a straight wooden handle and a red, wedge-shaped metal blade, featuring a contoured grip and visible markings.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the broad face of the red axe head and the straight wooden handle with a dark grip end.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the length of the handle and the wedge-shaped geometry of the red axe head.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the thickness of the axe head and the alignment of the handle with the blade.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the flat poll of the axe head and the full length of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a slight ergonomic contour and a dark, possibly rubberized grip at the end; oval cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped steel blade with a flat poll and a broad red-painted face; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the head fitted onto the handle.
